methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc: Bootstraps the pool with the USDC asset.

methods.name: depositToPool
methods.desc: Lenders deposit USDC into the pool to fund loans.

methods.name: requestLoan
methods.desc:
Borrowers request a microloan.
Requires MBR payment for the LoanRecord box.

methods.name: approveLoan
methods.desc: Admin approves a loan and sets interest rate based on risk (TTF score).

methods.name: disburseLoan
methods.desc: Admin disburses the approved loan funds to the borrower.

methods.name: repayLoan
methods.desc: Borrower repays the loan with simple interest.

usdcAssetId.desc: The asset ID of the USDC used for lending
